# Om Shanti N R Realty

> Business brand of Om Shanti N R Construction, a Palghar (Maharashtra, India) real-estate partnership firm established in 2005. Plans, develops and is associated with MahaRERA-registered residential and commercial projects across Palghar West and Palghar East.

## Projects in Palghar
- [Ostwal Imperial](https://omshantinrconstruction.com/projects/ostwal-imperial/): Palghar West — MahaRERA P99000049283
- [Shree Balaji Pride](https://omshantinrconstruction.com/projects/shree-balaji-pride/): Vevoor, Palghar East — MahaRERA P99000050656
- [Shiv Shrushti Complex](https://omshantinrconstruction.com/projects/shiv-shrushti/): Vevoor, Palghar East — MahaRERA P99000051314, P99000077209
- [Aastha](https://omshantinrconstruction.com/projects/aastha/): Tembhode, Palghar — plotted development
